memory:memory/2026-03-02.md:1:22.snippet: # 2026-03-02 ## Remote desktop capability plan (primary goal) Ethan’s primary goal: maximize ability to use OpenClaw + Desktop remotely with as many functions/capabilities as possible. ### Agreed approach / priorities 1) Install Tailscale on **Windows** (Desktop) + Windows laptop for stable remote access. 2) Enable/verify SSH access (prefer Tailscale SSH into Windows). Then use `wsl` from that shell to manage WSL/OpenClaw. 3) Finish ACP Gemini setup on Desktop: - Set `GEMINI_API_KEY` in the **openclaw-gateway systemd service** environment in WSL via `/etc/openclaw/secrets.env` + systemd override `EnvironmentFile=`. - Restart `openclaw-gateway`. - Run a Gemini ACP smoke test. 4) In
